ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "business_code" TEXT /* Code representing the business unit issuing the invoice */,
  "cust_number" TEXT /* Identifier for the customer receiving the invoice */,
  "name_customer" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "clear_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was cleared */,
  "business_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year associated with the invoice */,
  "document_create_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was created */,
  "due_in_date" TEXT /* Due date for payment of the invoice */,
  "invoice_currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the invoice */,
  "total_open_amount" REAL /* Total amount open on the invoice */,
  "baseline_create_date" TEXT /* Date when the baseline for payment was created */,
  "cust_payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the customer */,
  "isOpen" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the invoice is open */,
  "delay" INTEGER /* Number of days delayed in payment */,
  "invoice_status" TEXT /* Current status of the invoice */,
  "invoice_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice before any payments */,
  "invoice_description" TEXT /* Description of the invoice */,
  "invoice_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or code for the invoice */,
  "invoice_type" TEXT /* Type of invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_cust_number FOREIGN KEY ("cust_number") REFERENCES customers ("cust_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_cust_payment_terms FOREIGN KEY ("cust_payment_terms") REFERENCES payment_terms ("term_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_business_code FOREIGN KEY ("business_code") REFERENCES business_units ("business_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_number" TEXT /* Identifier for the customer */,
  "name_customer" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the customer */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the customer */,
  "customer_credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_units" (
  "business_code" TEXT /* Code representing the business unit */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business unit */,
  "business_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the business unit */,
  "business_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the business unit */,
  "business_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the business unit */,
  "business_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the business unit */,
  "business_tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number of the business unit */,
  "business_status" TEXT /* Status of the business unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_records" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice for which the payment is made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was received */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "remaining_balance" REAL /* Remaining balance after payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or code for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_records_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_types" (
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code representing the currency type (e.g., USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency (e.g., United States Dollar) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate against the base currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €) */,
  "currency_decimal_places" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places used in the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_terms" (
  "term_code" TEXT /* Code for the payment term (e.g., NAH4) */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment term */,
  "term_days" INTEGER /* Number of days for the payment term */,
  "term_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice related to the log entry */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change or update */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
